base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve squeeze_long PnL per trade and possibly total net profit by allowing more upside capture in a profile with modest tail risk and meaningful MFE. Trade count may fall slightly from the slope nudge, but should stay within the 10% global drop guardrail; reject if squeeze winners are capped/delayed into worse exposure, if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, or if pnl_per_exposure_hour deteriorates.
label: squeeze-upside-capture
rationale: Choose Batch B as the next one-family experiment because call-wall loosening, 1DTE tightening, no-0DTE pruning, runtime exits, and charm-wall structure edits have already hurt objective or are under-sampled. squeeze_long is underexplored, active, and comparatively clean: it contributes $755 with no slow trades and worst MAE much better than pullback/charm-pin tails. This tests profile-specific exit geometry plus a minimal local quality guard, not broad entry deletion.
